name: haim yavin
bio: Haim Yavin (Hebrew: חיים יבין; born September 10, 1932) is an Israeli television anchor and documentary filmmaker. He was one of Israel's leading news presenters, associated with the job for so many decades that he was known as "Mr. Television."

portrait_elements.meaning: helps anchor the gaze and reinforces haim yavin's news authority and broadcast credibility.
makes broadcast media the literal face of haim yavin's authority.
adds a journalistic, documentary layer to the portrait.

bio_elements.relevance: Hosting, presenting, or broadcasting are central to the subject’s media world.

bio_elements.relevance: Transmission and broadcast media belong to the subject’s field.

bio_elements.relevance: Filmmaking and screen production define the subject’s domain.

bio_elements.visual_representation: a bright rectangular frame with a clear border
bio_elements.relevance: Television and mediated public communication are part of the subject’s environment.

bio_elements.visual_representation: stacked horizontal bands like captions or headline strips
bio_elements.relevance: The biography supports a media persona built around public communication.
